name: jira-search-self-hosted
title: Jira Search (Self-Hosted)
description: Search for Jira issues (more tolerant and powerful than built-in), projects, and boards on Jira Server instances.
author: emanguy

commands.name: issue
commands.title: Search Issues
commands.subtitle: Jira Search (Self-Hosted)
commands.description: Search Jira issues by text, type and project

commands.name: open-issues
commands.title: Open Issues
commands.subtitle: Jira Search (Self-Hosted)
commands.description: Search Jira issues assinged to current user by text, type and project

preferences.name: token
preferences.title: Personal Access Token
preferences.description: Your API token as described at https://confluence.atlassian.com/enterprise/using-personal-access-tokens-1026032365.html

preferences.name: unsafeHTTPS
preferences.title: Unsafe HTTPS
preferences.description: Enable to use unsafe HTTPS for self-signed certificates.
preferences.label: Enable

preferences.name: defaultIncludeProjects
preferences.title: Default Included Projects
preferences.description: Comma-separated project keys or names to include when no @project filter is typed.

preferences.name: defaultExcludeProjects
preferences.title: Default Excluded Projects
preferences.description: Comma-separated project keys or names to exclude when no @project filter is typed.

preferences.name: defaultIncludeStatuses
preferences.title: Default Included Statuses
preferences.description: Comma-separated Jira statuses to include when no !status filter is typed.

preferences.name: defaultExcludeStatuses
preferences.title: Default Excluded Statuses
preferences.description: Comma-separated Jira statuses to exclude when no !status filter is typed.

preferences.name: defaultIncludeIssueTypes
preferences.title: Default Included Issue Types
preferences.description: Comma-separated issue types to include when no #issueType filter is typed.

preferences.name: defaultExcludeIssueTypes
preferences.title: Default Excluded Issue Types
preferences.description: Comma-separated issue types to exclude when no #issueType filter is typed.

preferences.name: defaultIncludeAssignees
preferences.title: Default Included Assignees
preferences.description: Comma-separated assignee names or emails to include when no %assignee filter is typed in Search Issues.

preferences.name: defaultExcludeAssignees
preferences.title: Default Excluded Assignees
preferences.description: Comma-separated assignee names or emails to exclude when no %assignee filter is typed in Search Issues.
